sections.title: SOS Moving — Top Rated Movers in San Fernando Valley
sections.content: Why San Fernando Valley residents choose SOS Moving:Local SFV Experts: Fully licensed & insured (USDOT 3398018), with hands-on experience across neighborhoods throughout the San Fernando Valley.Proven Reputation: 2,300+ happy customers with top ratings on Google (4.9★) and Yelp (4.8★).Upfront Pricing: Fair rates from $119/hour with transparent billing. A minimum of 3–4 hours is required for all moves, determined by your zip code.Why San Fernando Valley residents choose SOS Moving:Pack fragile and bulky items with pro‑grade materialsBuild custom crates and label every boxDisassemble, protect, and reassemble furniture
